steps.title: Keep verb and object together
steps.content: The verb phrase is have unearthed. The words that follow, including knives, horseshoes, and wool tunics, are the direct object of that verb.

steps.title: Remove separating punctuation
steps.content: Choice A inserts a colon between the verb and its object. Choice B inserts a comma, and Choice C inserts an em dash. A verb should connect directly to its object without intervening punctuation. The answer is D.
